title: Ajay Wardhan
overview: The biographical drama is based on Dr Ajay Aryan becoming a famed dental surgeon in Chandigarh, and follows the lead’s rise from being an impoverished goat herder in Haryana to achieving his goals. Meanwhile, his love story, break-up and reuniting with the love of his life also form an integral part of the tale.
